title: sagenia gigantea var. minor
intro: Sagenia gigantea var. minor, also known as the lesser club moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sagenia gigantea var. minor include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
